inputs.label: Average Return
inputs.businessContext: Portfolio's average return over the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Portfolio's average return over the period.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Rendite des Portfolios über den Zeitraum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement moyen du portefeuille sur la période.

inputs.label: Risk-Free Rate
inputs.businessContext: Risk-free rate of return (e.g., government bond yield).

businessContext_i18n.en: Risk-free rate of return (e.g., government bond yield).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Risksiz getiri oranı (örneğin devlet tahvili getirisi).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de rendement sans risque (par exemple, rendement des obligations d'État).

inputs.label: Target Return
inputs.businessContext: Minimum acceptable return (often equals risk-free rate).

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum acceptable return (often equals risk-free rate).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Minimum kabul edilebilir getiri (genellikle risksiz orana eşittir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Mindestakzeptable Rendite (entspricht oft dem risikofreien Zinssatz).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement minimum acceptable (souvent égal au taux sans risque).

inputs.label: Downside Deviation
inputs.businessContext: Downside deviation (standard deviation of returns below target).

businessContext_i18n.en: Downside deviation (standard deviation of returns below target).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aşağı yönlü sapma (hedefin altındaki getirilerin standart sapması).
businessContext_i18n.de: Abwärtsabweichung (Standardabweichung der Renditen unter dem Zielwert).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart à la baisse (écart-type des rendements inférieurs à la cible).

breakdown: Excess Return = Average Return - Target Return
Sortino Ratio = Excess Return / Downside Deviation
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
